purpose: Track dragons that are visible in the Dragon Pit but are not currently owned or hatched. This file is intentionally separate from dragons.json, which remains the owned-dragon master roster.

dragons.name: Kalspire
dragons.evidence: The Dragon Pit profile explicitly displays Not Hatched.

rules: Do not place entries from this file in dragons.json until ownership or hatching is confirmed.
Do not use not-owned dragons in current army compositions.
Add a dragon only when the screenshots explicitly confirm that it is not owned or not hatched.
